changelog.notes: EPG works with standard XMLTV guides; Back works on Bluetooth remotes during playback; security hardening of the data path.
Fixed a black screen when opening the app.
Initial release — IPTV channels, EPG guide, and phone-based setup.

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='#39c0d6' stroke-width='2'><rect x='2.5' y='5' width='19' height='13' rx='2'/><path d='M8 21h8M9 5l3-2 3 2' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

description.en: Watch IPTV channels with a full programme guide (EPG), played natively by the box. Set it up with an Xtream Codes login or an M3U playlist plus an XMLTV guide, entered from the TV or by scanning a QR with your phone.
description.hu: IPTV-csatornák nézése teljes műsorújsággal (EPG), a videót a box natívan játssza. Beállítás Xtream Codes belépéssel vagy M3U-lejátszási listával és XMLTV-műsorújsággal, a TV-ről vagy telefonos QR-beolvasással megadva.
